ddls:
CREATE TABLE "travel_records" (
  "travel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each travel record */,
  "travel_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the flight/train/ship */,
  "travel_mode_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mode of transportation */,
  "departure_location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the departure location */,
  "arrival_location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the arrival location */,
  "date_of_travel" TEXT /* Date of the travel */,
  "related_cases" TEXT /* Description of related probable or confirmed cases */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Seat number of the individual, if known */,
  "travel_status" TEXT /* Status of the travel (e.g., confirmed, canceled, rescheduled) */,
  "travel_class" TEXT /* Class of travel (e.g., economy, business, first class) */,
  "travel_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the travel */,
  "travel_distance" REAL /* Distance of the travel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("travel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_records_departure_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("departure_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_records_arrival_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("arrival_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_travel_records_travel_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("travel_mode_id") REFERENCES modes_of_transport ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modes_of_transport" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mode of transportation */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the mode of transportation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mode of transportation */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the mode of transportation */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Operator of the mode of transportation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health incident */,
  "travel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the travel record */,
  "case_description" TEXT /* Description of the health incident */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident was reported */,
  "incident_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the health incident (e.g., mild, severe) */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of health incident (e.g., confirmed case, probable case, suspected case) */,
  "incident_location" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the incident occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_incidents_travel_id FOREIGN KEY ("travel_id") REFERENCES travel_records ("travel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "travel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the travel record */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Seat number of the passenger */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the passenger */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the passenger */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the passenger */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the passenger */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Health status of the passenger (e.g., healthy, symptomatic, recovered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_travel_id FOREIGN KEY ("travel_id") REFERENCES travel_records ("travel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_authorities" (
  "authority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health authority */,
  "authority_name" TEXT /* Name of the health authority */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the health authority */,
  "headquarters_location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the health authority's headquarters */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the health authority */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the health authority */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("authority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_authorities_headquarters_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("headquarters_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case report */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the health incident */,
  "authority_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the health authority */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Details of the case report */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was submitted */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the case report (e.g., pending, reviewed, approved) */,
  "report_source" TEXT /* Source of the case report (e.g., health authority, passenger, public report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_reports_authority_id FOREIGN KEY ("authority_id") REFERENCES health_authorities ("authority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_reports_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES health_incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health officer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user's account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "travel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the travel record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_access_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("access_location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_travel_id FOREIGN KEY ("travel_id") REFERENCES travel_records ("travel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
